zh.lifeSummary: 當Cecilia Romney於大約1065年出生在英國英格蘭肯特笛卡爾 羅姆尼時，她的父親Lambert Romney27歲，母親Mrs Lambert de Romney20歲。她於大約1086年與William de St Leger在英國素可費艾利特結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1098年在英國英格蘭肯特武爾可姆享年34歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cecilia Romney于大约1065年出生在英国英格兰肯特笛卡爾 羅姆尼时，她的父亲Lambert Romney27岁，母亲Mrs Lambert de Romney20岁。她于大约1086年与William de St Leger在英国素可費艾利特结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1098年在英国英格兰肯特武爾可姆享年34岁。

nameMeanings.name: Romney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Romney (Kent), from an uncertain first element (perhaps an Old English personal name Rūmen) + Old English ēa ‘river, stream’. Compare Rye 2.

variants.name: Rumney
meanings: English (Cumberland and Durham): variant of   Romney  .

variants.name: Rye
meanings: English: topographic name for someone living at a place where rye (Old English ryge) was grown, or perhaps an occupational name for someone who grew or sold it.
Norwegian: habitational name from any of several farmsteads so named, most of them from Old Norse rjóthr ‘clearing in a forest’.

nameMeanings.name: Cecilia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin name Caecilia, feminine form of Caecilius ( see Cecil ). This was a good deal more common than the masculine form, largely due to the fame of the 2nd- or 3rd-century virgin martyr whose name is still mentioned daily in the Roman Catholic Canon of the Mass. She is regarded as the patron saint of music and has inspired works such as Purcell's ‘Ode on St Cecilia's Day’, although the reasons for this association are not clear.

variants.name: Cecelia
meanings: From the Latin name Caecilia, feminine form of Caecilius ( see Cecil ). This was a good deal more common than the masculine form, largely due to the fame of the 2nd- or 3rd-century virgin martyr whose name is still mentioned daily in the Roman Catholic Canon of the Mass. She is regarded as the patron saint of music and has inspired works such as Purcell's ‘Ode on St Cecilia's Day’, although the reasons for this association are not clear.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

en.lifeSummary: When Cecilia Romney was born about 1065, in Old Romney, Kent, England, United Kingdom, her father, Lambert Romney, was 27 and her mother, Mrs Lambert de Romney, was 20. She married William de St Leger about 1086, in Fairlight, Sussex, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1098, in Ulcombe, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 34.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cecilia Romney est née environ 1065, à Old Romney, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Lambert Romney, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Mrs Lambert de Romney, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé William de St Leger environ 1086, à Fairlight, Sussex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1098, à Ulcombe, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 34 ans.

Sie hat um 1086 in Fairlight, Sussex, England William de St Leger geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1098 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Ulcombe, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Cecilia Romneyが約1065年にイギリスイギリスケントオルド ロムニーで生まれた時，父Lambert Romneyは27歳，母Mrs Lambert de Romneyは20歳であった。約1086年にイギリススセックスファイルリトでWilliam de St Legerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1098年にイギリスイギリスケントウルコンベで34歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Cecilia Romney(이)가 대략 1065년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 드 롬니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lambert Romney(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs Lambert de Romney(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 대략 1086년 영국 수세스 파어라이트에서 William de St Leger(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1098년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 울코브에서 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cecilia Romney родилась около 1065 г. в местности олд ромни, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Lambert Romney было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Lambert de Romney, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de St Leger около 1086 г. в местности феирлаит, суссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1098 г. в местности улкомб, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 34 лет.
